label: Language School Transfer Recovery
customer_problem: A student missed the first class and wants an immediate move to an evening section without waiting for review.
customer_facts: The student missed the first class.
The student wants an evening-section transfer.
The student expects an immediate transfer.
risk_flags: Do not say the transfer is approved automatically.
Do not promise a level override.
Keep the first-two-meetings review rule visible.
success_criteria: Mirror the missed class and requested evening transfer.
Explain that transfers are reviewed during the first two class meetings.
Ask for the current section and target evening option.
operator_notes: Best demo for zero-shot habit transfer from makerspace access to school operations.
The selected habits should stay stable while the policy language changes.
